mapper.select: SELECT op.*, COALESCE(p.name, op.product_name) AS name, c.name AS category_name FROM wk_crm_order_product AS op LEFT JOIN wk_crm_product AS p ON op.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN wk_crm_product_category AS c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE op.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY op.sort ASC, op.r_id ASC
